hypothesis: Using pretrained equivariant ML surrogates (eqV2 or eSEN) to pre-converge NEB images and then restarting DFT SSNEB will reduce total computational time and number of NEB iterations compared to VASP-only calculations while producing final minimum energy pathways and transition-state structures/energies for CsPbI3 phase transitions and the TiO2-B→anatase transformation that agree with pure-DFT results within the 0.01 eV/Å convergence criterion.
